description: 3DEC reference documentation: syntax elements (property vocabularies) used within commands.

joint-models.name: Joint Constitutive Models
joint-models.description: 3DEC joint (sub-contact) constitutive model properties — elastic, mohr, bilinear-mohr, softening-mohr, cyjm, nonlinear, power, ratestate. Property vocabulary for 'block contact jmodel' / 'block contact property'.
joint-models.summary: 8 3DEC joint constitutive models — the keywords for 'block contact jmodel assign' + 'block contact property'
joint-models.usage: block contact jmodel assign <name> ; block contact property <prop> <value> [range jmodel <name>]

constitutive-models.name: Constitutive Models (Zone)
constitutive-models.description: 3DEC zone (deformable-block) constitutive material model properties — mohr-coulomb, drucker-prager, hoek-brown, ubiquitous-joint, creep models, etc. Property vocabulary for 'block zone cmodel assign' + 'block zone property'. Shared 9.0 kernel with FLAC3D.
constitutive-models.summary: 26 3DEC zone material models (subset of FLAC3D's set; docs shared via _common)
constitutive-models.usage: block zone cmodel assign <name> ; block zone property <prop> <value> [range cmodel-name <name>]

range-elements.name: Range Elements
range-elements.description: Geometric and logical 'range ...' filters (cylinder, sphere, plane, position, group, id, polygon, union, not, ...) used to scope any 3DEC command. Shared 9.0 kernel.

fish-intrinsics.name: FISH Intrinsics
fish-intrinsics.description: 3DEC FISH intrinsic families for scripted inspection — blocks & joints (sub-contacts), deformable-block zones/gridpoints, fracture-flow network.
fish-intrinsics.summary: 3 3DEC FISH intrinsic family groups (block/joint, zone/gridpoint, fluid-flow)
fish-intrinsics.usage: Use in FISH: loop foreach over <entity>.list; read with <entity>.<intrinsic>(ptr)

initial-conditions.name: Initial Conditions
initial-conditions.description: 3DEC initial conditions — stress initialization (block zone initialize / block insitu), velocity & displacement reset, fluid/thermal fields.
initial-conditions.summary: 3 3DEC initial-condition topics (block zone initialize / insitu / gridpoint initialize)
initial-conditions.usage: block zone initialize <stress-*> ... ; block insitu stress ... gradient ... ; block gridpoint initialize <field> ...

boundary-conditions.name: Boundary Conditions
boundary-conditions.description: 3DEC boundary conditions — mechanical face tractions, gridpoint & rigid-block fixity, fluid-flow, thermal/dynamic, apply modifiers. Uses 'block face apply' / 'block gridpoint apply' / 'block fix'.
boundary-conditions.summary: 5 3DEC boundary-condition topics (block face/gridpoint apply, block fix)
boundary-conditions.usage: block face apply <cond> ... range ... ; block gridpoint apply <cond> ... ; block fix <velocity|rotation> ...

geometry-data-table.name: Geometry, Data & Tables
geometry-data-table.description: 3DEC geometry import/generation (guides block cutting), data sets (scalar/vector/tensor/label), and table curves (load histories, property curves).
geometry-data-table.summary: 3 topics: geometry workflow, data sets, table curves
geometry-data-table.usage: geometry import '<file>' ; data scalar create ... ; table '<name>' add (x,y) ...

structural-properties.name: Structural-Element Properties
structural-properties.description: 3DEC structural-element property keywords — beam, cable, geogrid, liner, pile, shell. Vocabulary for 'structure <type> property' (elastic behavior via 'structure <type> cmodel').
structural-properties.usage: structure <type> create ... ; structure <type> cmodel ... ; structure <type> property <kw> <value> [range ...]

plot-items.name: Plot Items
plot-items.description: 3DEC plot item types and their keyword sets — block / bzone (continuum) / blockcontact / subcontact (joint mechanics) / joint / structure (SEL) / fracture (DFN) / flow. Vocabulary for 'plot item create <type> ...'.
plot-items.usage: plot item create <type> contour <attr> | label <type> | colorby <attr> [range ...]

histories-and-results.name: Histories & Results
histories-and-results.description: 3DEC history sampling (block / block contact / model / fish / structure history), management (interval/list/export), and results files (model results map/export, model save). Sampled field names share the plot-items contour vocabulary.
histories-and-results.usage: block history <field> ; block contact history <field> ; history interval <n> ; model results map ... export '<f>.result'

notes: References are syntax elements used within commands, not standalone commands
